competitions.title: I Refuse To Sit Around And Wait | This Is What I'm Doing Next
competitions.summary:
Thanks for Grüns for sponsoring this video! Get up to 52% off! Just click here https://gruns.yt.link/0s76VnR.
After winning the East vs West Light Heavyweight World Title, I thought I knew exactly what came next.

Defend the title against Matyushenko.

Instead, we've watched that opportunity get pushed back again... and again... and now, possibly again.
I'm not interested in sitting around waiting.
If Matyushenko wants the match, I'll be ready.

If he doesn't, then let's stop waiting and give someone else in the 105 kg division the opportunity to earn this belt.

So I'm putting the question to all of you...

Who deserves the shot?
Who has earned it?
And more importantly... who would YOU support if East vs West made the match happen?

Let me know in the comments. I read far more of them than you probably think.

MonsterMichaelTodd 
Armwrestling 
EastVsWest 
LightHeavyweight 105kg WorldChampion
